description: LDSA-mode comparison on VNN-COMP ERAN with k=3.
name: table11_incomplete_vnncomp_ldsa_k3
notes: The current public controller path exposes the paper's single-interaction setting, not the LDSA alternation mode used in Table 11.
The paper's VNN-COMP ERAN 5x100 and 8x100 correspond to the code variants `vnncomp_6x100` and `vnncomp_9x100`, because the code counts the output layer in the architecture label.
title: Incomplete-LayerABS vs. PRIMA on VNN-COMP ERAN under LDSA
